usaid_gov_ai_kazakhstan.baseline_notes: Illustrative benchmark baseline for demo-only USAID proposal-ops storytelling. Assumes multi-review cycle and manual donor-logic consolidation before a reviewable first draft. Not measured customer baseline.

eu_digital_governance_moldova.baseline_notes: Illustrative benchmark baseline for demo-only EU intervention-logic workflows. Assumes manual drafting plus annex-verification passes before buyer-ready review. Not measured customer baseline.

worldbank_public_sector_uzbekistan.baseline_notes: Illustrative benchmark baseline for demo-only World Bank results-framework workflows. Assumes manual PDO/results-framework reconciliation and ISR-style review before internal approval. Not measured customer baseline.
